veo_prompt: A young Asian man with short dark hair, wearing a black polo shirt with white collar and cuffs, sits at a desk in a modern office/study, rubbing his right eye with his index finger, looking tired and drained. The desk has a blurred laptop in the background; lighting is soft and neutral. (NewMoon brand logo with crescent moon and 'NewMoon SINCE 1959' is overlaid at the top right, fully legible). A close-up shot of an iPhone screen shows a notification bubble with 'Match starts soon ⚽'. (NewMoon brand logo with crescent moon and 'NewMoon SINCE 1959' is overlaid at the top right, fully legible). Back to the man, his right hand reaches into a sleek black toiletry bag on the desk. He pulls out a small, clear glass bottle of NewMoon ESSENCE OF CHICKEN 鸡精 with a forest-green screw cap and dark liquid. (PRODUCT INTERACTION: Right hand grips the bottle vertically, label facing camera, fully legible. SHAPE & SIZE LOCKED. LOGO LOCKED. CROSS-SCENE CONSISTENCY. Product label must remain upright, unaltered, and fully legible at all times). A close-up on the bottle as the man holds it firmly in his left hand, while his right hand rotates the green screw cap counter-clockwise and lifts it off in a continuous, realistic motion, revealing the dark liquid inside. Both hands are clearly visible, with fingers and palms naturally grasping the bottle and cap. (PRODUCT INTERACTION: Left hand stabilizes bottle, right hand unscrews cap. CAP REMOVAL MUST BE REALISTIC, continuous motion, both hands visible, fingers and palms visible. SHAPE & SIZE LOCKED. LOGO LOCKED. CROSS-SCENE CONSISTENCY. Product label must remain upright, unaltered, and fully legible at all times). (TEXT OVERLAY: 'ESSENCE OF CHICKEN' – BOLD WHITE CAPS, TOP HALF, FULLY LEGIBLE, MUST NOT FILL SCREEN; 'UNLEASH YOUR ENERGY' – BOLD WHITE CAPS, BOTTOM HALF, FULLY LEGIBLE, MUST NOT FILL SCREEN). The man then brings the uncapped bottle to his mouth and drinks, the liquid visibly flowing into his mouth and the bottle level decreasing. The scene transitions with a time-lapse effect from day to evening. After drinking, he looks up, visibly energized, and waves cheerfully. (PRODUCT INTERACTION: Man drinks from bottle. CONSUMPTION MUST BE REAL, liquid flows, level decreases. SHAPE & SIZE LOCKED. LOGO LOCKED. CROSS-SCENE CONSISTENCY. Product label must remain upright, unaltered, and fully legible at all times). Three young Asian men, now energetic and wearing soccer jerseys (one in white with the NewMoon logo, two in blue), are in a cozy living room at night, excitedly cheering and high-fiving in front of a large TV screen showing a soccer match. A coffee table in front of them is laden with snacks and several NewMoon ESSENCE OF CHICKEN 鸡精 bottles. They leap up in celebration, pumping their fists as a goal is scored. (NewMoon brand logo with crescent moon and 'NewMoon SINCE 1959' is overlaid at the top right, fully legible). A close-up shot of a single NewMoon ESSENCE OF CHICKEN 鸡精 bottle resting on a blue and white star-patterned soccer jersey, with a soccer ball nearby and a blurred stadium screen in the background. (PRODUCT INTERACTION: Bottle displayed on jersey, label facing camera, fully legible. SHAPE & SIZE LOCKED. LOGO LOCKED. CROSS-SCENE CONSISTENCY. Product label must remain upright, unaltered, and fully legible at all times). Then, the NewMoon ESSENCE OF CHICKEN 鸡精 bottle is shown next to a NewMoon jar of Bird's Nest, both upright on the jersey. Dynamic energy lines pulsate around them. (TEXT OVERLAY: 'SUSTAIN ENERGY' – WHITE CAPS, BOTTOM LEFT; 'STAY STRONG' – WHITE CAPS, BOTTOM CENTER; 'SUPPORT RECOVERY' – WHITE CAPS, BOTTOM RIGHT. ALL FULLY LEGIBLE, MUST NOT FILL SCREEN). The final scene is a grand, brightly lit soccer stadium at night, with confetti falling. A soccer ball rests on the lush green pitch in the foreground, with the NewMoon ESSENCE OF CHICKEN 鸡精 bottle and Bird's Nest jar prominently displayed on the grass. Dynamic lightning and energy graphics fill the mid-ground. (TEXT OVERLAY: 'POWER TO GO BEYOND' – BOLD YELLOW OUTLINED WHITE CAPS, CENTER, LARGE, FULLY LEGIBLE, MUST NOT FILL SCREEN; 'GAME ON, ENERGY UP' – BOLD WHITE CAPS, BELOW CENTER, FULLY LEGIBLE, MUST NOT FILL SCREEN; 'SUSTAIN ENERGY' – WHITE CAPS, BOTTOM LEFT; 'STAY STRONG' – WHITE CAPS, BOTTOM CENTER; 'SUPPORT RECOVERY' – WHITE CAPS, BOTTOM RIGHT. ALL FULLY LEGIBLE, MUST NOT FILL SCREEN). (NewMoon brand logo with crescent moon and 'NewMoon SINCE 1959' is overlaid at the top center, fully legible).

confidence_notes: VEO may struggle with pixel-perfect logo replication, realistic liquid flow/level decrease, and precise continuous cap rotation. Exact facial expressions for 'tired' vs 'energized' can vary. Text overlay positioning and ensuring it doesn't overlap elements (especially product labels) is a common challenge. The time-lapse transition might not be perfectly smooth or convincing. Dynamic energy graphics might vary in style.
